testcase.name: test_live_chat_citations_have_clean_fields

failure.message: AssertionError: citation[0].section is null/empty: {'act': 'Income Tax Act, 1961', 'section': None, 'note': None} assert None + where None = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfb9cbed84280>('section') + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfb9cbed84280> = {'act': 'Income Tax Act, 1961', 'section': None, 'note': None}.get

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_phase3_fixes.py:168: in test_live_chat_citations_have_clean_fields assert c0.get("section"), f"citation[0].section is null/empty: {c0}" E AssertionError: citation[0].section is null/empty: {'act': 'Income Tax Act, 1961', 'section': None, 'note': None} E assert None E + where None = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfb9cbed84280>('section') E + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfb9cbed84280> = {'act': 'Income Tax Act, 1961', 'section': None, 'note': None}.get
